description: Euro-Area Sovereign Fragmentation Engine - fuses ECB SovCISS (daily) and FRED 10Y yields into per-country OAT/BTP/Bonos-Bund spreads, a 0-100 fragmentation score, core-vs-periphery split, a France deep-dive and ECB TPI context. Output data/euro-fragmentation.json.

schedule.description: Euro-Area Sovereign Fragmentation Engine — daily 12:20 UTC
